criteria.name: Above 55% WR
criteria.explanation: SP500 daily MLP hits 54.86% — 0.14% from target. Structural OHLCV ceiling: every TA variant converges here.

criteria.name: Above 50% BTC WR
criteria.explanation: BTC 15-min is random walk (49.96%). No TA-based strategy breaks 50% on 15-min BTC.

criteria.name: p < 0.05 (stat sig)
criteria.explanation: Permutation test p=0.12 — not significant at 95% confidence. Need p < 0.05.

criteria.name: Out-of-sample > 52%
criteria.explanation: Walk-forward OOS WR = 54.86% > 52% threshold. Consistent across 10-fold split.

criteria.name: Sharpe > 1.0
criteria.explanation: Annualized Sharpe = 0.72. Below 1.0 threshold for institutional-grade strategy.

criteria.name: Max DD < 20%
criteria.explanation: Max drawdown = 11.3%. Within 20% circuit breaker threshold.

criteria.name: Ensemble > single
criteria.explanation: Ensemble majority vote = 52.85% vs single model 50.41%. Ensemble reduces variance.

criteria.name: Profit factor > 1.5
criteria.explanation: Gross win/gross loss = 1.12. Below 1.5 threshold for viable strategy.
